task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a new refuse reason named 'Overqualified'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form view or list view in the Odoo Recruitment settings showing a refuse reason with the exact name 'Overqualified'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Overqualified' refuse reason is linked to the correct email template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the configuration for the 'Overqualified' refuse reason, the Email Template field is set to 'Recruitment: Refuse'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens the application record for Sarah Jenkins.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo application form view for 'Sarah Jenkins' (position: Experienced Developer) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selects the new refuse reason when refusing the applicant.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Refuse' popup/wizard is open for Sarah Jenkins, and 'Overqualified' is selected in the Refuse Reason dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify the applicant is successfully refused with the correct reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application record for Sarah Jenkins shows a 'Refused' status (e.g., a red 'Refused' ribbon) and the chatter/history shows the refusal reason 'Overqualified'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation through the Odoo web interface (menus, forms, buttons) rather than terminal windows executing scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the standard Odoo 17 interface with the Recruitment app, not a text editor or static mockup.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use database commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing psql or python scripts modifying the hr.applicant or hr.applicant.refuse.reason tables directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected refuse reason name is exactly 'Overqualified'. The email template to link is 'Recruitment: Refuse'. The applicant to be refused is 'Sarah Jenkins' applying for the 'Experienced Developer' position. Successful completion requires the applicant's status to show as refused with the newly created reason.
